---
name: rice
description: >-
  Reload the Snazzy rice. Restart eww bar, reload mako, and report the status of all themed components
---

<!-- GENERATED BY hg-global-skill-sync.sh FROM ~/.claude/commands/rice.md; DO NOT EDIT -->

Reload the Snazzy rice. Restart eww bar, reload mako, and report the status of all themed components.

Run these commands:
1. `killall waybar 2>/dev/null; eww close-all; killall -9 eww 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; eww daemon && eww open bar && eww open bar-secondary`
2. `makoctl reload`
3. `notify-send "Rice" "eww + Mako reloaded"`
4. Show which Snazzy-themed configs are active by checking symlinks in ~/.config/
